t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: APEX broker external ID. Decimal(38,0) to accommodate APEX very large numeric ID format.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: APEX broker external ID. Decimal(38,0) to accommodate APEX very large numeric ID format. Passthrough from Dim_Customer.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Ticker symbol. "USD", "EUR", "AAPL.US". UNIQUE constraint in production. The primary identifier used in UIs and APIs.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Ticker symbol. "USD", "EUR", "AAPL.US". UNIQUE constraint in production. The primary identifier used in UIs and APIs. Passthrough from Dim_Currency via Fact_BillingWithdraw.ProcessCurrencyID.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Internal segment label. FK to Dictionary.Label. LabelID=26 = BonusOnly customer (triggers IsHedged=0). Default=0.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Internal segment label. FK to Dictionary.Label. LabelID=26 = BonusOnly customer (triggers IsHedged=0). Default=0. Passthrough from Dim_Customer.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Customer experience/permission level. FK to Dictionary.PlayerLevel. 1=Standard (94%); 4=Popular Investor; 7=VIP. Determines available features and risk limits. Default=0.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Customer experience/permission level. FK to Dictionary.PlayerLevel. 1=Standard; 4=Popular Investor; 7=VIP. Determines available features and risk limits. Default=0. Passthrough from Dim_Customer.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Short code for the regulation. Used in V_Dim_Customer and analytics dashboards. Values match production Dictionary.Regulation.Name.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Short code for the regulation. Values match production Dictionary.Regulation.Name. Dim-lookup passthrough via Fact_SnapshotCustomer.RegulationID.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Brand name displayed in BackOffice interfaces, reports, and internal systems. Multiple LabelIDs can share the same Name (e.g., 0, 1, 9 all = 'eToro').
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Brand name displayed in BackOffice interfaces, reports, and internal systems. Dim-lookup passthrough via Dim_Label.LabelID.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Dropped multi-LabelID sharing detail (0, 1, 9 all = eToro)

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Exchange fee in provider-specific integer units.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Exchange fee in provider-specific integer units. Passthrough from Fact_BillingWithdraw.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Human-readable depot name (e.g., 'MoneyBookers USD', 'Neteller', 'Wire'). Unique across all depots. Used in admin dashboards, routing logs, and discrepancy reports.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Human-readable depot name (e.g., 'MoneyBookers USD', 'Neteller', 'Wire'). Unique across all depots. Used in admin dashboards, routing logs, and discrepancy reports. Dim-lookup passthrough via Fact_BillingWithdraw.DepotID.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Tier display name: Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Platinum Plus, Diamond, Internal, N/A. Used in BackOffice reporting JOINs and customer-facing UI.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Tier display name: Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Platinum Plus, Diamond, Internal, N/A. Used in BackOffice reporting JOINs and customer-facing UI. Dim-lookup passthrough via Fact_SnapshotCustomer.PlayerLevelID.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Human-readable restriction state label. Unique per status. Used in BackOffice UI, compliance reports, and monitoring dashboards. Note: some values have trailing spaces in live data -- apply RTRIM() for string comparisons.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Human-readable restriction state label. Unique per status. Used in BackOffice UI, compliance reports, and monitoring dashboards. Dim-lookup passthrough via Fact_SnapshotCustomer.PlayerStatusID.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Full country name in English. Unique per row. Used in UI dropdowns, compliance documents, and analytical reports.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Full country name in English. Unique per row. Used in UI dropdowns, compliance documents, and analytical reports. Dim-lookup passthrough from Dim_Country via Dim_Customer.CountryID.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Card brand name. Unique constraint prevents duplicates in production. Used in payment UI, transaction records, and fraud reporting.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Card brand name. Unique constraint prevents duplicates in production. Used in payment UI, transaction records, and fraud reporting. Dim-lookup passthrough from Dim_CardType via Dim_CountryBin.CardTypeID from Fact_BillingWithdraw.BinCodeAsString.

issues.problem: T1 description significantly abbreviated: dropped 'Unique per row. Used in UI dropdowns, compliance documents, and analytical reports.' from Dictionary.Country upstream. Inconsistent with RegCountry (#30) which preserves the full text for the same source column.
Dropped '(94%)' distribution percentage from Dim_Customer upstream description. Minor data point lost.
Dropped 'Multiple LabelIDs can share the same Name (e.g., 0, 1, 9 all = eToro)' from Dim_Label upstream. Useful context for analysts doing GROUP BY on Label.
Dropped trailing-spaces warning from Dim_PlayerStatus upstream: 'Note: some values have trailing spaces in live data -- apply RTRIM() for string comparisons.' Practical gotcha lost.
No explicit Phase Gate Checklist with P2/P3 checkboxes. Footer says 'Phases: 11/14' but does not specify which phases were completed vs skipped.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: Minor fixes only: (1) Restore full upstream text for RegCountryByIP #31 — add 'Unique per row. Used in UI dropdowns, compliance documents, and analytical reports.' to match RegCountry #30 treatment. (2) Restore '(94%)' for PlayerLevelID #17. (3) Restore multi-LabelID sharing detail for Label #19. (4) Restore trailing-spaces warning for PlayerStatus #28. (5) Add explicit Phase Gate Checklist section marking P2/P3 completion status.
